title: Prepare v0.5.39 candidate metadata after lockfile process correction
rawUserRequest: 在 lockfile Python 路径根因修复已完成并合并后，基于最新候选分支最终树重新生成 v0.5.39 发布候选元数据；预算和格式检查必须作为本发布候选工单的事前硬门禁，不单独创建预算工单。不发布 tag/provider release，先完成本工单的完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 生命周期。

declaredIntent.summary: 让 v0.5.39 候选元数据绑定到包含 lockfile 根因修复及本工单预算策略的候选分支最终树，为合并后的最终发布冻结提供稳定输入。

outOfScope: Final default-branch lifecycle projection before closure
Adopter projects and installed runtime repositories
Changing archive encoding or weakening source-bound checks

sources.reason: Candidate finalizer is the required source-bound metadata generation path.
Release declaration to bind to the candidate archive.
Measured budget policy that must be reserved before this archive.
Predecessor closure evidence and serial ordering boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Candidate metadata is generated from a source-bound final tree, provider publication is excluded, and exact archive checks remain fail-closed.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete candidate PR/merge/close workflow before publication.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate source identity, archive digest, measured budget, and that no provider publication occurs.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before candidate generation and finish to prevent release-state drift.

acceptance: Candidate release metadata is generated by finalize-release-freeze-candidate from this branch's final tree.
release.json, release-state.json, release-digests, and release-freeze agree on candidate source and archive identity.
Measured archiveGrowth=505 and pythonLines=39509 pass hard budget and formatting gates in this same functional release Work Item.
The candidate Work Item completes archive, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default sync without provider publication.
guidelines: Candidate metadata must be generated by the repository finalizer, not hand-edited.
Keep exact source/archive checks fail-closed and keep template metadata separate from adopter projects.
Budget and formatting checks are hard preflight gates; do not create a budget-only Work Item.
Do not claim published or closed release lifecycle from candidate evidence alone.

intent.problem: The previous candidate metadata was generated before the lockfile process correction and its archive, so the final release source identity must be projected again from the latest candidate tree.
constraints: Include the measured archive reservation in this functional candidate Work Item.
Generate metadata only after all non-metadata candidate changes are present.
Do not claim final closed lifecycle or publish from this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Candidate mode removes the circular dependency by binding metadata to the complete candidate tree; final closed lifecycle evidence is generated only after merge and ai-close-work-item.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete Contract/Preflight/PR/merge/ai-close-work-item release workflow and publication after verification.

rollbackNote: Revert this candidate Work Item diff and restore the previous release projections and budget policy.

budgetImpact.reason: Reserve the measured candidate release archive in the same functional release Work Item; no budget-only Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Candidate finalizer binds metadata to this branch HEAD and canonical archive
Default branch and provider publication remain out of scope until candidate closure
